source_scan_evidence.packages/core: No imports of apps, agents, or knowledge found under packages/core/src.
source_scan_evidence.packages/knowledge: No imports of packages/agents or old src/agents found under packages/knowledge/src.
source_scan_evidence.packages/agents: Imports @decomp-orchestrator/knowledge and @decomp-orchestrator/core only among workspace runtime packages.
source_scan_evidence.apps/cli: Imports workspace packages and resolves child subprocesses through apps/cli/src/bin/decomp-orchestrator.ts.
source_scan_evidence.apps/dashboard-server: Imports workspace packages, serves apps/dashboard/dist, and invokes the CLI app entrypoint.
